blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned when querying InfluxDB directly is the right choice versus remote-writing metrics
- Verified your InfluxDB instance is running and gathered connection credentials
- Added and configured the InfluxDB data source in Grafana Cloud
- Configured the Flux query language, URL, organization, bucket, and API token
- Successfully tested the connection to your InfluxDB instance
- Explored InfluxDB data in Grafana Explore using a Flux query
